description.ko: 유동적인 형태와 자연스러운 리듬의 완벽한 조화, AURA-7의 '유기적 흐름'은 공간을 가로지르는 생명 에너지의 정수를 우아하고 조화롭게 담아냅니다.
description.en: A seamless blend of fluid shapes and natural rhythms, AURA-7's Organic Flow captures the essence of living energy moving through space with grace and harmony.

prompt: AURA-7 style, organic fluid shapes, iridescent liquid textures, flowing silk-like waves, natural bioluminescent glow, soft pastel gradients, ethereal motion blur, high-resolution 3D abstract art, macro lens perspective, harmonic composition, liquid metal aesthetics, smooth transitions.
